prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: PanDDA analysis group deposition -- Crystal structure of PLpro-C111S in complex with Fr13431. Entity description: Papain-like protease nsp3. Entry keywords: HYDROLASE PLpro, SARS-CoV-2, HYDROLASE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.40113; mean_interface=0.261872; max_segment_membrane_density=0.804233; mean_disorder=0.184804. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
